{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46681", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "## Summary

The _copyProps function in lib/src/object/copy.ts uses for...in to iterate over source object properties without an Object.hasOwnProperty check, and does not filter dangerous keys (__proto__, constructor, prototype). This allows an attacker to pollute the prototype chain of all objects in the application.

## Details

In _copyProps() (copy.ts lines 186-191), the code iterates all enumerable properties including inherited ones and dangerous keys like __proto__. Any object with a __proto__ key (e.g., from untrusted JSON input) will overwrite the target's prototype.

## PoC
```
const malicious = JSON.parse('{"__proto__": {"polluted": true}}');
objDeepCopy(malicious);
console.log({}.polluted); // true
```
## Suggested Fix

Add objHasOwnProperty check and filter __proto__, constructor, prototype keys.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0006, "percentile": 0.19093}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:41:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46681"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:41:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nevware21/ts-utils/security/advisories/GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nevware21/ts-utils/security-advisories/GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nevware21/ts-utils", "summary": "@nevware21/ts-utils: Prototype Pollution in objDeepCopy/objCopyProps via for...in without hasOwnProperty", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T21:41:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7j8-49r8-mr43", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.14.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@nevware21/ts-utils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.13.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @nevware21/ts-utils: Prototype Pollution in objDeepCopy/objCopyProps via for...in without hasOwnProperty
